ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company or financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., NASDAQ, Yahoo Finance) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Exchange, API, File) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key or authentication token for accessing the data source */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data synchronization */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user account creation */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp of session start */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp of session end */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is associated with */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of alert creation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, news, economic indicator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, portfolio performance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of report creation */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of publication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the economic indicator */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of publication */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the economic indicator belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
